content: Backend: remover variáveis/imports não usados (alert_service.py prefs, explain.py high, server.py daily_refresh_job, routes_assets.py imports, poc_core.py imports)
Frontend: corrigir key={index} por chaves estáveis (Portfolio metrics, AuthLayout perks, AssetInsights income+options, Landing steps/features/faqs)
Refatorar Admin.jsx em sub-componentes (components/admin: Overview, Users, Assets, Alerts, Billing, Settings + Shared)
Verificação: esbuild compile frontend, import backend, logs supervisor e screenshots (login superadmin + Admin tabs)
